parsed.availability_comment: In West Indies' final T20 World Cup 2026 squad and no fresh injury/suspension report found before GT's March 31 opener.
parsed.availability_note: Available for IPL start; no current injury report found. Small deduction remains because full league fixture list is not yet published and overseas management can change.
parsed.followup_reason: Recent public XI projections conflict on Holder's role versus Phillips/Rabada/Banton, so final GT combination still needs toss-and-conditions confirmation.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Not an overseas lock because Buttler and Rashid are near-certain picks, leaving Holder in a tactical contest mainly with Rabada/Phillips depending on balance.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Competes for one of four overseas spots with Buttler, Rashid Khan, Rabada, Glenn Phillips, plus Banton/Luke Wood as backup options.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: Auction buy and squad option, but projected GT XIs differ on whether Holder or Phillips/Tom Banton gets the extra overseas slot.
